query: INSERT INTO peppr_sp_assignments (id, request_id, provider_id, is_active, assigned_staff_name, created_at) VALUES ('seed-assign-001', 'seed-req-001', 'seed-sp-transport-001', 1, 'Somchai Driver', NOW()), ('seed-assign-002', 'seed-req-002', 'seed-sp-spa-001', 1, 'Nipa Therapist', NOW()), ('seed-assign-003', 'seed-req-003', 'seed-sp-transport-001', 1, 'Chai Tour Guide', NOW()), ('seed-assign-004', 'seed-req-004', 'seed-sp-spa-001', 0, 'Malee Therapist', NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_active=VALUES(is_active);
